registry-lookup.description: Registry Lookup MCP — 521M+ entities across 309 jurisdictions. Geo-blocked outside US; resolver falls back to EDGAR/Companies House automatically.

companies-house.description: Companies House MCP — UK company registry. Free, unlimited, accessible globally.

sec-edgar.description: SEC EDGAR MCP — US public company filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K) and XBRL financial facts. No API key needed. Rate limit: 10 req/sec.
